data.title: 国际服活动复刻「Basking in the Brilliance of Their Serenade」
data.summary: [Event Preview] Sensei, 'Basking in the Brilliance of Their Serenade' event is coming back soon! If
data.body:
[Event Preview]

Sensei, 'Basking in the Brilliance of Their Serenade' event is coming back soon!

If you missed it before, this is your chance to see it!
